text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After blasting through the Classics, Maruzensky
takes on the last big race of the year, the Arima
Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This is where the best of the best in the classic
and senior years come together in one place.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's going to be so much fun! I can't wait to get
started!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Watch, I'm going to be running at the head of the
pack against the top racers around!
choice_data_list: Time for you to become a Grand Prix champion!
Time for you to become a Grand Prix champion!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know it! Standing on that podium is going to
be so rad!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Even the paddock is packed with
spectators!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky! Show us another out-of-this-world
run!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Good luck! We'll be rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! You ran with me in the Asahi Hai.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: I'm... just a spectator today... B-but...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I'll run with you again someday! I'm gonna catch
up to you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I'll be cheering for you, so you'd better win,
okay?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll give you a race to admire!
